title: GPTexture
description: Minecraft but the textures are recreated by ChatGPT. (Youtube)
body:
```
Please note that this resource pack is no longer maintnained by me, clones/fan recreation may  appear, please don't send hate to them.
```

ChatGPT recreates every texture of Minecraft.

GPTexture is a resource pack where each textures of the game is generated by ChatGPT 5o, white staying in the vanilla style.
This is an ambitious project and a free-time project because there are more than 3000 textures to make.
## Gallery :

![Village (Before a20 version)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cA6VjwNI/images/731a9036d01e5769be532330d15cac7e17f6d67a_350.webp)
![Stony Shore (Before a20 version)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cA6VjwNI/images/a54340962b92a52006b85bfe4d0a2ac2ac8c75d4_350.webp)

## Note :
- GPTexture is still a work-in-progress ressource pack.
- This project is part of a Youtube Concept.
